title: Just wow!
text: The Bass Treble and the overall quality of the headset is beyond my imagination and thus the support of the bose audio is relentlessly out of the world.

title: Mind-blowing purchase
text: Sound is so crisp and clear, with a punchy bass, just loved it!! Amazing headphones i must say at this price range. ANC is great! Build quality as well. Overall perfect for every music lovers!
